rationale: The citing paper uses an Andrews et al. (2002) citation in the model section to justify that a latent-class heterogeneity specification can be treated as comparable to continuous HB approaches. That would indicate a potentially substantive methodological-support role. However, in the provided PDF images the specific Andrews et al. reference visible is a different 2002 JMR paper, so the exact role of the DOI-targeted paper cannot be confirmed with confidence from this document alone. Given this identification uncertainty, the safest classification is ambiguous.
